title: Food Security in India: Trends, Patterns and Determinants
abstract:
The concept of food security has evolved, developed, multiplied and diversified
since the first World Food Conference of 1974. There are close to 200 different
definitions of the term, but the essence of all these definitions is similar. The most
common and useful definition of food security is "food security exists when all
people, at all times, have physical. social and economic access to sufficient, safe and
nutritious food which meets their dietary needs and food preferences for an active and
healthy life....
